title: MCSM Official Pack
description: A Minecraft Story Mode based resource pack that adds the aspects of it.
body:
MCSM Official Pack is finally getting released however the mod is not done yet the team is working super hard on it!
To note:
- make sure you guys are placing this pack 1st because other wise the sound effects and cursor and others wont work properly.
- to make the cursor sfx to appear you need to install the following mod's: - For the cursor: [Minecraft Cursor](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor)
- For the sfx: [ConsoleSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/consolesounds) - For the original enchantment glint before 1.19.4: [Legacy Glint](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/legacyglint)
- And for the title screen menu background image: [Simple Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-menu) (Requires the library mod Collective.)
- For the yellow text when hovering or clicking a button: [YellowText](https://modrinth.com/mod/yellowtext)
- And for arrows use the mod: [2D Projectiles ➵](https://modrinth.com/mod/twod_projectiles)
Now that all of these are out of the way there is also the mcsm s2 main menu music playing in only the title screen! and also u guys dont need to install other stuff everything is done automaticly u just need to install all those things from above.
FOR THE BEST EXPERIENCE USE PROGRAMMER'S ART RESOURCE PACK!!! (make sure its the 2nd resource pack in the line)
Shouout to feycional for the 3d arrow on bow the goat. Credits to egocrafts for the story mode title screen menu.
